name: 离子键
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 结构 2 · 化学键与结构 Structure 2 · The Molecular World
curriculum_points: Explain the formation of ionic bonds between metals and non-metals as a result of electron transfer, leading to the formation of cations and anions held together by electrostatic forces (AO2).

Deduce the formula and name of an ionic compound from the charges on the constituent ions, and describe the typical physical properties (high melting point, brittleness, electrical conductivity) of ionic compounds in relation to their lattice structure (AO2, AO3).

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化
